creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209863
wireguard-go-0.0.20191012_1.patch

===>  Building for wireguard-go-0.0.20191012
# golang.org/x/sys/unix
vendor/golang.org/x/sys/unix/ztypes_freebsd_arm64.go:400:12: undefined: uint128

http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/data/head-arm64-default/p518685_s355218/logs/errors/wireguard-go-0.0.20191012.log

Unbreak by updating golang.org/x/sys to 33540a1f6037 and golang.org/x/net to 83d349e8ac1a which adds support for freebsd/arm64. Upstream PR: https://github.com/WireGuard/wireguard-go/pull/1

Tested on 12.1-STABLE/arm64 and 12.1-RELEASE/amd64.
